name: conflict_check
description: a conflict-of-interest checking world for new matters; actions intake, screen, clear, decline

card.description: a conflict-of-interest checking world for new matters; actions intake, screen, clear, decline

rules: A matter advances strictly ready -> intake -> screened -> (cleared | declined).
intake opens a file on a prospective matter named by a client; without a named client the matter cannot be intaken.

screen compares the matter's adverse parties against the firm's current client roster (existing_clients); each adverse party already represented is recorded as a conflict (case- and whitespace-insensitive).
clear may open a matter ONLY when it has been screened and carries no outstanding conflict; clearing a conflicted matter is forbidden and is a no-op.
decline refuses a screened matter and is the required outcome when an unwaivable conflict is found.
On clear the new client joins existing_clients; clear and decline both return the firm to 'ready' for the next intake.
Any action taken out of sequence leaves the world unchanged.

transition.code:
def transition(state, action):
    s = dict(state)
    name = action.get("name")
    params = action.get("params") or {}

    matter = dict(s.get("matter") or {})
    existing = list(s.get("existing_clients") or [])
    log = list(s.get("log") or [])

    def norm(x):
        return str(x).strip().lower()

    def empty_matter():
        return {"client": "", "adverse_parties": [], "intake_complete": False}

    if name == "intake":
        # Open a file on a fresh prospective matter; only when idle ('ready').
        if s.get("stage") != "ready":
            return s
        if "client" in params:
            matter["client"] = params["client"]
        if "adverse_parties" in params:
            matter["adverse_parties"] = list(params["adverse_parties"])
        # A matter cannot be intaken without a named prospective client.
        if not matter.get("client"):
            return s
        matter["adverse_parties"] = list(matter.get("adverse_parties") or [])
        matter["intake_complete"] = True
        s["matter"] = matter
        s["stage"] = "intake"
        s["conflicts"] = []
        s["screened"] = False
        s["decision"] = "pending"
        log.append("intake")
        s["log"] = log
        return s

    if name == "screen":
        # Run the conflict check against the firm's current client roster.
        if s.get("stage") != "intake" or not matter.get("intake_complete"):
            return s
        roster = set(norm(c) for c in existing)
        conflicts = []
        for party in matter.get("adverse_parties") or []:
            if norm(party) in roster and party not in conflicts:
                conflicts.append(party)
        s["conflicts"] = conflicts
        s["screened"] = True
        s["stage"] = "screened"
        log.append("screen")
        s["log"] = log
        return s

    if name == "clear":
        # Clear to open ONLY a screened matter with no outstanding conflict.
        if s.get("stage") != "screened":
            return s
        if s.get("conflicts"):
            return s  # guarded: a conflicted matter cannot be cleared
        client = matter.get("client")
        if client and client not in existing:
            existing.append(client)  # the new client joins the roster
            s["existing_clients"] = existing
        s["decision"] = "cleared"
        s["stage"] = "ready"
        s["screened"] = False
        s["matters_cleared"] = int(s.get("matters_cleared", 0)) + 1
        log.append("clear")
        s["log"] = log
        s["matter"] = empty_matter()
        return s

    if name == "decline":
        # Refuse a screened matter (the proper outcome for a real conflict).
        if s.get("stage") != "screened":
            return s
        s["decision"] = "declined"
        s["stage"] = "ready"
        s["screened"] = False
        s["matters_declined"] = int(s.get("matters_declined", 0)) + 1
        log.append("decline")
        s["log"] = log
        s["matter"] = empty_matter()
        return s

    return s  # unknown / out-of-order action: no-op (deterministic)

objectives.name: protect_existing_clients
objectives.goal: never clear a matter that carries an unwaived conflict

objectives.name: screen_before_decision
objectives.goal: every cleared or declined matter must first have been screened

objectives.name: open_clean_business
objectives.goal: maximize matters cleared once confirmed conflict-free
